title: During a flight, two pilots observed a pulsating red and white UFO over Pará [1996]

text_preview: MARCH 18th, 1996. Time: 21h14. Duration: 15 minutes. A pilot and a co-pilot reported the sighting, with the naked eye, of an unidentified flying object when flying from Belo Horizonte [State of Minas Gerais] to Belém [State of Pará]. According to the pilots’ report, the UFO was a “pulsating light” with the size “twice that of the Morning Star”. According to them, the color of the UFO varied between red and white, and its speed was approximately 420 kt [777 km / h]. The unknown object followed a horizontal path, then a vertical one. According to the description of the pilots in the COMDABRA’s r
summary: A pilot and co-pilot on a Belo Horizonte–Belém flight observed a pulsating red and white UFO for 15 minutes on March 18, 1996; COMDABRA reported.
